name: corp-telemetry
description: Programmatic governance gateway for Copilot Chat. Captures model id, real token counts, cost, verdict, and emits OpenTelemetry to Application Insights for every @corp turn. Layer 4 of the governance architecture (see scenario-3/docs/governance-architecture.md).

chatParticipants.name: corp
chatParticipants.description: Governed entry point. Captures model + tokens + cost into App Insights, then dispatches to corp.py / fraud-analyst / legal-counsel.

commands.name: case
commands.description: Run a fraud + legal analysis pipeline through corp.py for a given case id.

commands.name: ask
commands.description: Ask the gateway a free-form question. Still telemetered, but does NOT run the case pipeline.

corp.appInsightsConnectionString.markdownDescription: Application Insights connection string. If empty, the extension reads `APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING` from the environment (or `${workspaceFolder}/.env.scenario-3`).

corp.actor.markdownDescription: Identity tag emitted on every span (e.g. your Entra UPN). Defaults to `os.userInfo().username` if empty.

corp.team.markdownDescription: Team / cost-center tag emitted on every span.

corp.pythonPath.markdownDescription: Python executable used to invoke `scenario-3/src/corp.py`. Empty = auto-detect (`${workspaceFolder}/.venv/Scripts/python.exe` on Windows, `${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python` elsewhere).

corp.pricingYamlPath.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative path to `pricing.yaml`. Used to compute `corp.cost_usd` per turn.
